title: polyscias bracteata subsp. subincisa
intro: Polyscias bracteata subsp. subincisa, also known as the Hawaiian fan palm or Polyscias, is a species of flowering plant in the family Araliaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Polyscias bracteata subsp. subincisa include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate pain, as well as its use in treating skin conditions and wounds. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions that can be applied topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
